linux.description: Download azul + generated bindings, build with Cabal

steps.content: mkdir -p src/Azul/Internal && curl -o src/Azul.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul.hs && curl -o src/Azul/Types.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul/Types.hs && curl -o src/Azul/Internal/FFI.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul/Internal/FFI.hs
cabal build --extra-lib-dirs=. && LD_LIBRARY_PATH=. cabal run hello-world

macos.description: Download azul + generated bindings, build with Cabal

steps.content: mkdir -p src/Azul/Internal && curl -o src/Azul.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul.hs && curl -o src/Azul/Types.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul/Types.hs && curl -o src/Azul/Internal/FFI.hs $HOSTNAME/release/$VERSION/Azul/Internal/FFI.hs
cabal build --extra-lib-dirs=. && DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=. cabal run hello-world

windows.description: Download azul + generated bindings, build with Cabal (under MSYS2 / GHCup)

steps.content: mkdir src\Azul\Internal && curl -o src\Azul.hs %HOSTNAME%/release/%VERSION%/Azul.hs && curl -o src\Azul\Types.hs %HOSTNAME%/release/%VERSION%/Azul/Types.hs && curl -o src\Azul\Internal\FFI.hs %HOSTNAME%/release/%VERSION%/Azul/Internal/FFI.hs
